## Project Summary

Modern React admin application with:
- React 19.2 + TypeScript 5.9
- Vite 7.3 build system
- React Router 7 for page routing
- Tailwind CSS v4 with shadcn/ui components
- Clean folder structure (pages, layouts, routes, components)

All tasks completed successfully. Project is ready for development.
